page_content:
CHEM271 General Chemistry and Energetics (2 Credits)

An introduction to the physical aspects of chemistry; chemical kinetics, thermodynamics and electrochemistry in the context of current chemistry research.

Prerequisite: CHEM241 and CHEM242; or CHEM247. And a grade of C-

or better in the prerequisites for College of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences majors and recommended for all students.
